mapper.select: SELECT p.product_no, p.product_no AS id, p.company_no, p.product_name, p.product_name AS name, p.product_details, p.product_details AS content, p.original_price, p.original_price AS price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.img_url AS thumbnail, p.large_category, p.medium_category, p.deposit, p.reg_date, c.com_name, /* 상세 조회 시에도 프론트엔드 태그 노출 방어벽을 위해 동일 서브쿼리 매핑 적용 */ ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pt_all.tag SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_tag_map ptm_all INNER JOIN product_tag pt_all ON ptm_all.tag_id = pt_all.id WHERE ptm_all.product_no = p.product_no ) AS tag FROM product p LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, product_details = #{productDetails}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, is_active = #{isActive}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, large_category = #{largeCategory}, medium_category = #{mediumCategory}, deposit = #{deposit} WHERE product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(company_no, product_name, product_details, original_price, is_active, img_url, large_category, medium_category, deposit, reg_date) VALUES(#{companyNo}, #{productName}, #{productDetails}, #{originalPrice}, #{isActive}, #{imgUrl}, #{largeCategory}, #{mediumCategory}, #{deposit}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tag FROM product_tag ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT p.product_no, p.product_no AS id, p.company_no, p.product_name, p.product_name AS name, p.product_details, p.product_details AS content, p.original_price, p.original_price AS price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.img_url AS thumbnail, p.large_category, p.medium_category, p.deposit, p.reg_date FROM product p WHERE p.large_category = #{largeCategory}

SELECT DISTINCT large_category, medium_category FROM product WHERE large_category IS NOT NULL AND medium_category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIELD(large_category, '결혼', '가족행사', '친구와함께'), medium_category ASC
SELECT tag, medium_category FROM product_tag WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND medium_category IS NOT NULL
